name: year_offset range with where filters
description: Test case for year_offset range with where filters
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2018,2019,2020,2021]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('QB')), "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8" as (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG')) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0), "te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a" as (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG')) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0), "te2e62ab0c3b039bd04155be2c5a866a9" as (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) ELSE 0 END as pass_comp_pct_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(psr_pid)), "tc49528ab6aaa409c51706abb50213f97" as (select COALESCE(psr_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_comp_pct_from_plays_numerator, SUM(CASE WHEN sk is null or sk = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pass_comp_pct_from_plays_denominator from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(psr_pid)) select "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."fantasy_points_from_plays" AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_0", (SELECT SUM(te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a.fantasy_points_from_plays) FROM te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a WHERE te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a.pid = t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.pid AND te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a.year BETWEEN t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.year + 1 AND t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.year + 3) AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_1", "te2e62ab0c3b039bd04155be2c5a866a9"."pass_comp_pct_from_plays" AS "pass_comp_pct_from_plays_0", (SELECT SUM(tc49528ab6aaa409c51706abb50213f97.pass_comp_pct_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(tc49528ab6aaa409c51706abb50213f97.pass_comp_pct_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM tc49528ab6aaa409c51706abb50213f97 WHERE tc49528ab6aaa409c51706abb50213f97.pid = t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.pid AND tc49528ab6aaa409c51706abb50213f97.year BETWEEN t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.year + 1 AND t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.year + 3) AS "pass_comp_pct_from_plays_1", "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."year", "player"."pos" from "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."pid" inner join "te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a" on "te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a"."pid" = "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."pid" and te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a.year BETWEEN t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.year + 1 AND t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.year + 3 left join "te2e62ab0c3b039bd04155be2c5a866a9" on "te2e62ab0c3b039bd04155be2c5a866a9"."pid" = "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."pid" and te2e62ab0c3b039bd04155be2c5a866a9.year = t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8.year and te2e62ab0c3b039bd04155be2c5a866a9.year IN (2018,2019,2020,2021) where player.pos IN ('QB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."fantasy_points_from_plays", te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a.fantasy_points_from_plays, "te2e62ab0c3b039bd04155be2c5a866a9"."pass_comp_pct_from_plays", "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."year", "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" having SUM(te425b28d3ac0ae8fda8a933f1211f36a.fantasy_points_from_plays) >= '300' order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "t1ab0db584561d04b828e43601e5c0eb8"."pid" asc limit 500
